events.text: Thomas Meunier (Belgium) is shown the yellow card.
Éric Davis (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Yoel Bárcenas (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Belgium 1, Panama 0. Dries Mertens (Belgium) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner.
Armando Cooper (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Amir Murillo (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Aníbal Godoy (Panama) is shown the yellow card.
Jan Vertonghen (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Belgium 2, Panama 0. Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kevin De Bruyne.
Goal!  Belgium 3, Panama 0. Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Eden Hazard with a through ball   following a fast break.
Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
